testcase.name: [1:6] get all users and then get the first user by id
[1:6] create a new user
[1:6] List Users (listCollections equivalent)
[2:12] Create User (createCollection equivalent)
[3:26] Update User (updateCollection equivalent)
[4:40] Delete User (deleteCollection equivalent)
